zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Dudley alias Sutton於大約1439年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏時，她的父親Sir John Dudley alias Sutton40歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Berkeley41歲。她於大約1460年與Henry de Beaumont III在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾杜德利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1485年在英國英格蘭享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Dudley alias Sutton于大约1439年出生在英国英格兰波克夏时，她的父亲Sir John Dudley alias Sutton40岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Berkeley41岁。她于大约1460年与Henry de Beaumont III在英国英格兰斯塔福爾杜德利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1485年在英国英格兰享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dudley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from Dudley in Worcestershire, recorded as Duddeleye, Doddeleye in the 13th and 14th centuries, named from the Old English personal name Dudda (see Dodd 1) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish (southern Ireland): in Ireland, when not the English name, it was adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Dubhdáleithe ‘descendant of Dubhdáleithe’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + dá ‘two’ + léithe ‘sides’.

variants.name: Dowdall
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish John Patrick, Niall.
Irish (Dublin, Meath, and Louth): English surname adopted by bearers of Gaelic Ó Dubhdáleithe (see Dudley 2).

variants.name: Dagley
meanings: English: variant of Dadley, itself a variant of Dudley , with dissimilation of d-d to d-g.
Americanized form of German Dägele (see Dagle ) or Degele, from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names formed with Old High German diot ‘people, nation’.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

variants.name: Diddle
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Dudley  . Compare   Aduddell  .
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of German   Dittel  .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Dudley alias Sutton was born about 1439, in Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Dudley alias Sutton, was 40 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Berkeley, was 41. She married Henry de Beaumont III about 1460, in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1485, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Dudley alias Sutton est née environ 1439, à Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Dudley alias Sutton, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Berkeley, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Beaumont III environ 1460, à Dudley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1485, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

Sie hat um 1460 in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Henry de Beaumont III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Lei sposato Henry de Beaumont III circa 1460, nel Dudley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Dudley alias Sutton(이)가 대략 1439년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Dudley alias Sutton(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Berkeley(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드들리에서 Henry de Beaumont III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1485년 영국 잉글랜드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Dudley alias Sutton родилась около 1439 г. в местности биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Dudley alias Sutton было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Berkeley, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Beaumont III около 1460 г. в местности дудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1485 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.
